name: report_simlib_info
full_help:
report_simlib_info

Description: 
Report info of simulation libraries

Syntax: 
report_simlib_info  [-file <arg>] [-append] [-quiet] [-verbose] <path>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-file]     Output file
              Default: report_simlib_info.log
  [-append]   Append mode
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <path>      Specify the path for pre-compiled libraries

Categories: 
Simulation

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
